report_name: Maine Disables Public Data Breach Portal After Trolls Post Fake VRChat and Discord Breaches

threat_actors.name: Maine Data Breach Portal Hoax Submitter
threat_actors.description: An unknown individual or group who submitted fraudulent data breach reports to the Maine Attorney General's public portal to cause disruption and reputational damage.
threat_actors.goals: Cause disruption, reputational damage, and spread Fear, Uncertainty, and Doubt (FUD) by abusing a public data breach reporting system.

attack_patterns.name: Stored Data Manipulation
attack_patterns.description: An unknown entity submitted fraudulent data breach reports for VRChat and Discord to the Maine Attorney General's public data breach portal, inserting false data into the public database.

identities.name: Office of the Maine Attorney General
identities.description: Operates the public-facing data breach notification portal that was abused with fraudulent submissions, forcing it to be taken offline.

identities.name: VRChat
identities.description: A social VR platform that was the subject of a fraudulent data breach report submitted to the Maine AG's portal. The company publicly denied any breach.

identities.name: Discord
identities.description: A communication platform that was the subject of a fraudulent data breach report submitted to the Maine AG's portal.
